title: Titanium-containing Substances Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Titanium-containing Substances Group
- Titanium-containing Substances Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). The assessment focuses on 13 substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Titanium-containing Substances Group.
- Summary of publications
Proposed conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities

None planned at this time

Titanium tetrachloride

Titanium hydroxide (Ti(OH)4), (T-4)-
Anticipated publication of the final assessment.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 157, No. 43 .
